ham.subject: Your Weekly Marketing Newsletter – Exclusive Offers Inside
ham.body:
Hello Valued Customer,

We’re thrilled to bring you the latest updates from our store! This week, enjoy up to 20% off on all summer collection items, plus a special bundle offer on our best-selling home décor.

Featured Deals:
- 20% off on all swimwear: <URL>
- Buy one, get one free on kitchen gadgets: <URL>
- Exclusive 10% discount for newsletter subscribers: <URL>

Don’t miss out – these offers end Sunday at midnight.

Thank you for being a part of our community!

Best regards,
The Marketing Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Crypto Wallet Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
